CPSS260 College Park Scholars: Science, Technology & Society - Peer- Teaching Practicum (1 Credit)

Supervised peer teaching in science, technology and society. Prerequisite: CPSS101.

Restriction: Matriculation into the College Park Scholars Science, Technology & Society (CPSS) program.
